calibration.method: Bayesian MCMC (CmdStanR + brms) and quantile regression
calibration.notes: Calibration based on FIA data. 6 of 7 component models integrated (tree: DG, H-D, HG, mortality, CR; stand: SDIMAX, BAMAX).

diameter_growth.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_growth.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_diameter.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

height_crown_base.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

mortality.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

crown_recession.notes: Posterior summary; full draws referenced via draws_csv.

provenance.baseline: calibrated population/pooled mean of each component fit

scale.dds_multiplier: DDS scale exp(delta b0); emitter applies sqrt for diameter-growth scale
scale.mort_multiplier: mortality rate ratio from survival logit incl species random effect

diameter_growth.notes: Species-free (B1) coefficients. Species effect computed at runtime as standardized traits times gamma plus ecoregion / forest-type random effects. Source bundle: dg.

metadata.default_policy: hybrid_per_species: leg_a where per-species fit reliable (shrinkage, w>=0.5), else leg_b

height_growth.notes: Species-free (B1) coefficients. Species effect computed at runtime as standardized traits times gamma plus ecoregion / forest-type random effects. Source bundle: hg_v5_prod.

height_diameter.notes: Species-free (B1) coefficients. Species effect computed at runtime as standardized traits times gamma plus ecoregion / forest-type random effects. Source bundle: htdbh_v2split.

height_crown_base.notes: Species-free (B1) coefficients. Species effect computed at runtime as standardized traits times gamma plus ecoregion / forest-type random effects. Source bundle: hcb_v2split.

crown_recession.notes: Species-free (B1) coefficients. Species effect computed at runtime as standardized traits times gamma plus ecoregion / forest-type random effects. Source bundle: cr_t2.

mortality.notes: Species-free (B1) coefficients. Species effect computed at runtime as standardized traits times gamma plus ecoregion / forest-type random effects. Source bundle: surv_crz.

diameter_growth.form: ln(dDBH) = a0 + a1*ln_dbh + a2*dbh_sq + a3*ln_cr_adj + a4*ln_si + a5*bal_over_lndbh + a6*sqrt_sba
diameter_growth.notes: ORGANON-form (arm 1). Coefficients are NOMINAL placeholders. Backfill via 62c once the CONUS-wide Bayesian ORGANON recalibration and Greg's climate-only DG form land. Selected with version=conus_organon; the shared categories_conus_mod modifier layer applies on top.

metadata.note: Arm 1 ORGANON-form coefficients; select with version=conus_organon.

diameter_growth.notes: Multiplier = exp(mod_eta). mod_eta = coef_mgmt*trt_decay + coef_dstrb*dstrb_decay + b1*bgi + b2*(bgi-knot)_+ + z_L1. Baseline (no event) => trt/dstrb decay 0.

metadata.note: Shared multiplicative modifier applied by any arm: growth = base * exp(mod_eta).

height_growth.notes: Multiplier = exp(mod_eta). mod_eta = coef_mgmt*trt_decay + coef_dstrb*dstrb_decay + b1*bgi + b2*(bgi-knot)_+ + z_L1. Baseline (no event) => trt/dstrb decay 0.

height_diameter.notes: Multiplier = exp(mod_eta). mod_eta = coef_mgmt*trt_decay + coef_dstrb*dstrb_decay + b1*bgi + b2*(bgi-knot)_+ + z_L1. Baseline (no event) => trt/dstrb decay 0.

height_crown_base.notes: Multiplier = exp(mod_eta). mod_eta = coef_mgmt*trt_decay + coef_dstrb*dstrb_decay + b1*bgi + b2*(bgi-knot)_+ + z_L1. Baseline (no event) => trt/dstrb decay 0.

crown_recession.notes: Multiplier = exp(mod_eta). mod_eta = coef_mgmt*trt_decay + coef_dstrb*dstrb_decay + b1*bgi + b2*(bgi-knot)_+ + z_L1. Baseline (no event) => trt/dstrb decay 0.

bagrowth.model: stand-level basal-area growth (log periodic annual BA increment)
bagrowth.scale: Gaussian on ln(BAI); BAI = stand basal-area increment m2/ha/yr; predict exp(eta) then * YEARS for the interval target
bagrowth.response: ln(bai_annual); bai_annual = sum_i TPA_i * max(BA2_i - BA1_i, 0) / YEARS (survivors)
bagrowth.stand_key: PLT_CN_cond1 x CONDID_cond1 x INVYR1 x INVYR2 (matches 71_fit_stand_survival.R)
bagrowth.target: stand BA increment over interval = exp(linpred) * YEARS; feeds stand_constraint.py::stand_disaggregate_bagrowth (proportional tree-dg scale)

covariates.bgi: stand mean bgi; 2-piece spline knot at median

bagrowth.notes: Symmetric to 71_fit_stand_survival.R. Stand BA-growth target reconciles the summed tree DG via a proportional factor gamma on tree dg (BA increment is additive).

metadata.note: Stand-level target that reconciles the summed tree predictions (disaggregation): survival -> M_stand for the kappa hazard solve; bagrowth -> stand BA increment for the tree-DG scale; topht -> García/GADA H2|H1 target for the tree height-growth scale; stems -> García N(t) surviving-stems target (reuses the kappa hazard solve). Applied by any arm.

topht.scale: Gaussian on r = ln(H2/H1) (log height-growth ratio); H2 = H1*exp(eta_r)
topht.response: r = ln(H2/H1); H1,H2 = TPH-weighted mean height of tallest top_n_per_ha stems/ha (survivors)
topht.stand_key: PLT_CN_cond1 x CONDID_cond1 x INVYR1 x INVYR2 (FIA plot-condition-remeasurement)
topht.transition: H2_target = H1 * exp(b0 + b_lnH1*ln(H1) + b_lnyr*ln(YEARS) + b_rd*rd + b_lnqmd*ln_qmd + b_bgi*bgi + z_L1)
topht.gada_static_form: Cieszewski-Bailey base-age-invariant Chapman-Richards H=b1*(1-exp(-b2*t))^b3 (gada_refit.r; site via b1); this bundle is the STATE-SPACE H2|H1 transition, not the static site form
topht.notes: H2 target feeds stand_constraint.py::stand_constrain_topheight to scale tree height growth so stand top height tracks this García/GADA trajectory.

stems.model: stand-level García state-space STEM-DENSITY N(t) transition
stems.scale: cloglog binomial with centered log(YEARS)-3.9 exposure offset; intercept refolded to raw log(YEARS). Linear predictor eta_h = log stand hazard, SAME scale as 71_fit_stand_survival.R and the tree mortality model
stems.response: deaths_i | trials(trials_i); trials = round(N1 stems/ha), deaths = round(N1 - N2 survivors)
stems.stand_key: PLT_CN_cond1 x CONDID_cond1 x INVYR1 x INVYR2 (FIA plot-condition-remeasurement)
stems.transition: H_stand = exp(eta_h); S(T)=exp(-H_stand*T); N2_target = N1 * S(T); eta_h = b0 + b_lnN1*ln(N1) + b_topht*top_ht + b_rd*rd + b_lnqmd*ln_qmd + z_L1
stems.novelty: No García-style stem-number transition existed in the repo (only the Reineke SDIMAX line in 09_fit_stand_density.R); this is the newly fitted N(t) state-space transition

covariates.ln_n1: log start stand stems/ha (current state N1)
covariates.top_ht: stand top height (m), tallest top_n_per_ha stems/ha -- self-thinning driver

stems.notes: N2 target feeds stand_constraint.py::stand_constrain_stems, which reuses the kappa proportional-hazard solve (N_target is the stems form of M_stand).
